description: Homeowner who has decided to hire a professional and hasn't started shopping. Highest Angi value per email. Time horizon 2-3 weeks between capture and signed contract.

subject_lines: Your home needs a {{ home.tonnage }}-ton HVAC system. Here's what that means in English.
Your {{ location.city }} HVAC sizing — and the words that'll save you on quotes
sequence.preheader: The numbers, the lingo, and what to actually ask the first contractor who calls.

subject_lines: The 10 things every HVAC quote should include
HVAC quote checklist (forward this to whoever's deciding with you)
sequence.preheader: A bid missing 3+ of these is telling you something about how the contractor operates.

subject_lines: A federal tax credit worth up to $2,000 most homeowners don't claim
IRA Section 25C: how to actually get the heat pump tax credit
sequence.preheader: It's not a deduction — it's a dollar-for-dollar credit on your federal taxes.

subject_lines: Two weeks in. Here's the 3-quote ask.
sequence.preheader: You've got the vocabulary, the checklist, the credit framework. Last step is bids in front of you.

personalization_variables.home.sqft: number — square footage from the load calc
personalization_variables.home.tonnage: number — system size in tons (1 ton = 12,000 BTU/hr cooling)
personalization_variables.home.insulation: string — Excellent / Better than avg / Average / Worse than avg / Bad
personalization_variables.location.state_slug: string — lowercase abbreviation for DSIRE URL (e.g. ma)
personalization_variables.location.climate_region: string — Hot / Warm / Mixed / Cool / Cold
personalization_variables.cta_url: string — pre-built Angi URL with utm tags (per-email)

notes: Subject lines run through Liquid render too — the {{ home.tonnage }} merge field in subject 1 of day0 must be hydrated server-side before the send.
Resend's {{{unsubscribe_url}}} is wrapped in {% raw %}...{% endraw %} inside footer.liquid so it survives Liquid render and reaches Resend intact.

Pre-2026-04-19 captures lack the qualifying-question tags (segment / is_diy / contractor_stage), so they should NOT be enrolled in this sequence — they go through the legacy re-segment touch instead (per the original plan).
